treatments.brief: A Q1-Q4 quarterly cost bar chart: four bars (Q1-Q4 2026) with amounts, the current quarter highlighted navy.
A download card: 'Kwartaaloverzicht Q1 2026' with a total + a navy 'Download PDF' button (the signature) + file meta.
A cost-trend area/line chart over the last quarters (navy line/area), with a current-value callout.
A quarter category breakdown: a donut or ranked bars of cost categories (Onderhoud, Verf, Tuigerij) for the quarter + center total.
A year-over-year comparison: Q1-Q4 paired bars 2025 vs 2026, with a % change indicator.
